summary: Verified sticky header fix on Mira modal and /mira-demo page. The header section (Soul Ticker, Mira logo, pet selector, and PetOSNavigation tabs) now stays fixed at the TOP when scrolling, and the chat composer stays fixed at the BOTTOM. All tests passed on both /mira-pillar-sandbox and /mira-demo pages.
critical_code_review_comments: Sticky header fix implemented correctly using .mira-sticky-header wrapper class
CSS at lines 69-85 and 10294-10310 in mira-prod.css properly configures position:sticky, top:0, z-index:90
Modal-specific CSS (lines 10273-10332) ensures proper flex layout for scrollable messages with fixed header/footer
Close button (X) on modal works correctly with data-testid='close-mira-modal'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sticky header bug fix is VERIFIED. Both /mira-pillar-sandbox (modal) and /mira-demo pages correctly maintain sticky header at top and fixed composer at bottom when scrolling.

elements_verified.pet_os_navigation: Navigation tabs stay visible at top
